timeline.title: Research Intern
timeline.summary: Focus: code agents with multi-turn reinforcement learning.
highlights: Conducting research on code agents under multi-turn reinforcement learning settings.
Collaborating with the Qwen team on agent training and evaluation.
Exploring practical agent systems for coding workflows.

timeline.title: PhD Student
timeline.summary: Focus: data-centric pre-training, trustworthy LLMs, and efficient post-training.
highlights: Working with Prof. Junxian He in the HKUST NLP Lab.
Researching data selection, prompt learning, and knowledge distillation for LLMs.
Publishing on pre-training and post-training methods for language models.

timeline.title: Teaching Assistant
timeline.company: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
highlights: Supported undergraduate machine learning teaching in Spring 2025.
Assisted with tutorials, grading, and student questions.

timeline.title: Teaching Assistant
timeline.company: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
highlights: Supported postgraduate machine learning teaching in Spring 2024.
Worked with students on assignments and course logistics.

timeline.title: Teaching Assistant
timeline.company: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
timeline.summary: COMP 2711H: Honors Discrete Mathematical Tools for Computer Science
highlights: Supported honors discrete mathematics teaching in Fall 2023.
Helped students strengthen mathematical foundations for CS.

timeline.title: Natural Language Processing Engineer
timeline.company: Search and Strategy Department, Baidu China Co., Ltd.
timeline.summary: Worked on e-commerce shopping search ranking and query-document matching.
highlights: Designed and developed search algorithms under e-commerce shopping scenarios.
Optimized Query-Doc correlation calculation and ranking using semantic understanding techniques.
Improved ERNIE-based retrieval adaptation to goods' property information, raising recall at 90 precision from 82.6% to 88.9%.
